meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and overcome the 'no portfolio' trap. An advanced-level checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop building toy projects. The Antigravity project template allows you to rapidly scaffold production-grade SaaS architecture. By leveraging Claude Code for iterative development, you can transform a blank slate into a high-fidelity, monetizable MVP in hours, effectively manufacturing a professional portfolio that signals immediate value to potential stakeholders and customers.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank repository, the silence of a missing portfolio deafening in the ears of potential clients. In the high-stakes world of AI SaaS, 'no portfolio' is synonymous with 'zero trust.' You possess the vision, but your lack of shipped, production-ready code acts as a glass ceiling preventing you from securing your first high-ticket contract.

But the tide is turning. By utilizing the Antigravity project template and the raw power of Claude Code, you can bypass the drudgery of boilerplate setup. We aren’t just building code; we are engineering a demonstration of authority that proves you can ship, iterate, and monetize in a landscape that rewards speed above all else.

steps.title: Scaffold the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize your project structure using the Antigravity template to ensure enterprise-grade security and scalability from commit zero.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the Antigravity base template with integrated authentication, Stripe billing, and PostgreSQL ORM.

steps.title: Define the Domain Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map out your core business logic, ensuring the data schema supports your specific monetization model.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the business requirements for a subscription-based AI tool and generate the necessary Prisma schema and API endpoints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add ./src/schema.prisma --prompt 'Generate schema for multi-tenant subscription tiers'

steps.title: Implement the AI Engine
steps.description: Integrate your AI model handling, focusing on low-latency response times and robust error handling for production users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the AI service layer within the Antigravity template to handle async streaming responses from the Anthropic API.

steps.title: Optimize for Revenue
steps.description: Connect your billing architecture to your user authentication flow to ensure every feature is gated by a subscription check.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Hook the Stripe webhooks into the user management system to toggle feature access based on billing status.

steps.title: Automated Quality Assurance
steps.description: Deploy automated testing suites to ensure your MVP is bulletproof before the first user lands.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive test suite for the critical user flow, covering auth, billing, and AI generation.

pro_tips: Always build for the edge case; investors and clients judge your code by how it handles failure, not success.
Use environment-specific secrets management from the jump; hardcoding keys is the fastest way to lose technical credibility.
Prioritize 'Time-to-First-Dollar' over feature density; your portfolio is only as strong as your ability to process a payment.
Leverage Claude Code to document your decisions in the commit history; this creates an audit trail that proves your engineering maturity.
Keep your UI minimal; professional SaaS products are judged by their utility, not their decorative complexity.
content.next_steps: Once the MVP is deployed, immediately set up a feedback loop with five potential users to validate your core value proposition before adding complex features.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to silence the doubt and build a legacy. Stop waiting for permission to be an expert. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
